title: Match search across all CSV files
evidence: src/br_soccer/data.clj:168-177 loads 5 match files; br_soccer/query.clj provides matches-by-team, matches-between, matches-by-season, matches-by-competition

title: Player data search (FIFA database)
evidence: src/br_soccer/data.clj:179-184 loads fifa_data.csv; br_soccer/query.clj:168-200 provides players-by-name, players-by-nationality, players-by-club, top-players

title: Match statistics (wins/losses/draws/goals)
evidence: src/br_soccer/query.clj:59-89 team-stats calculates matches, wins, draws, losses, goals-for, goals-against

title: Head-to-head team comparison
evidence: src/br_soccer/query.clj:91-105 head-to-head function returns match record between two teams

title: Team name normalization and matching
evidence: src/br_soccer/data.clj:23-44 normalize-team handles state suffixes (-SP, -RJ, etc.), parenthetical codes, trim, and case-insensitive matching

title: MCP server with properly formatted responses
evidence: src/br_soccer/mcp.clj:63-113 dispatch function returns JSON-RPC formatted responses for all 8 tools

title: Competition standings calculation
evidence: src/br_soccer/query.clj:107-140 standings function calculates league table with points (3 for win, 1 for draw) and goal difference

title: All 6 CSV files loadable and queryable
evidence: src/br_soccer/data.clj loads Brasileirao_Matches, Brazilian_Cup_Matches, Libertadores_Matches, BR-Football-Dataset, novo_campeonato_brasileiro, fifa_data; all files verified present in data/kaggle/

title: Date format handling (ISO, DD/MM/YYYY, with time)
evidence: src/br_soccer/data.clj:64-75 parse-br-date handles both YYYY-MM-DD and DD/MM/YYYY formats with optional time

title: UTF-8 encoding and special characters
evidence: src/br_soccer/data.clj:10 reads CSV with UTF-8 encoding; data files verified to contain Brazilian Portuguese text (accents, cedillas)

title: MCP protocol initialization and tool discovery
evidence: src/br_soccer/mcp.clj:8-57 defines 8 tools with inputSchema; lines 127-133 implement initialize and tools/list methods

title: All tests pass
evidence: 15 tests in 3 test modules, 39 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors
